waivers.testName: renders varied streams (no-usage), large output, child placeholder and resize
waivers.rationale: BLK-MULTIPLATFORM: Bun 1.3.14 for Windows ARM64 omits bun:ffi/TinyCC, so the OpenTUI native renderer cannot initialize; headless CLI, persistence, supervision and distribution remain mandatory in this job.
